items.title: Caterpillar Stock Is an Unlikely AI Play as Data Center Power Demand Surges
items.description: Caterpillar  has embraced a new business on the back of the data-center buildout, as developers looking to reduce strain on the grid increasingly turn to alternative methods to satisfy the energy needs of artificial intelligence.  The company, perhaps best known for its heavy-duty construction equipment, has leaned further into the sale of engines and gas-powered generators.  While it services a broad range of customers, it has seen particularly strong interest from data-center developers.

items.title: Dow Jones Industrials 2025: These Three Unexpected Stocks Top Nvidia
items.description: The Dow Jones' top five stocks of the year included two names investors may not have expected to find next to AI giants like Nvidia and IBM.
